articles.title: Frontispiece Portrait of Eliza R. Snow
articles.complete_text:
PORTRAIT OF ELIZA R. SNOW

Second General President of the Relief Society
of the Church of Jesus Christ
of Latter-day Saints
—Painted by John Willard Clawson.
articles.notes: Found the frontispiece portrait caption on page 144 of the PDF images. This is a portrait caption rather than a full article, describing the painting of Eliza R. Snow by John Willard Clawson.

articles.title: Portrait of Zina D. H. Young
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 141-144, but the Portrait of Zina D. H. Young is listed on page 114 in the table of contents. The images provided do not contain page 114, so the portrait cannot be found in these specific pages.

articles.title: Portrait of Bathsheba W. Smith
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 141-144, but the Portrait of Bathsheba W. Smith should be on page 116 according to the table of contents. The images provided do not contain this portrait or any related text about Bathsheba W. Smith.

articles.title: Portrait of Louise Y. Robison
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 141-144, but the Portrait of Louise Y. Robison should be on page 122 according to the table of contents. The images provided do not contain this portrait or any related content.

articles.title: Spring is Here Bertha M. Rosevear
articles.author: Bertha M. Rosevear
articles.notes: The article is not present in the provided PDF page images (pages 141-144). The article should appear on page 123 according to the table of contents, but the provided images are from much later pages in the magazine.

articles.title: National Council of Women
articles.notes: The provided PDF images (pages 141-144) do not contain the article 'National Council of Women' which should appear on page 129 according to the table of contents. The images show pages that are beyond the expected location of this article.

articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 141-144 which contain 'Guide Lessons for May' content about crime and delinquency statistics. Page 160 where 'The Quest' should appear is not included in these images.
